summary: Sales Auto-Assignment Pipeline testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed. The run-auto-assign endpoint correctly processes triage documents and routes them based on customer->rep mappings. Documents without rep mappings stay in triage as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: No API endpoint exists to create customer_rep_overrides - this is only available via direct service call. Consider adding POST /api/sales-dashboard/rep-overrides endpoint for admin use.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Auto-Assignment Pipeline fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/sales-dashboard/run-auto-assign processes unassigned/triage docs and attempts to assign reps based on customer_rep_overrides or BC cache. SALES_ELIGIBLE_TYPES = {Sales_Order, SalesOrder, Order_Confirmation, PurchaseOrder}. AUTO_APPROVE_CONFIDENCE = 0.95. The auto-assign is hooked into both _internal_intake_document (email path at ~line 3026) and intake_document (upload path at ~line 3574) in server.py. Documents without rep mappings route to triage status.

verified: Returns 200 with status=completed
Returns processed, assigned, triage, skipped, errors counts
Processes documents with sales_review_status=triage or no assigned_rep_email
Routes to triage when no rep mapping exists
Idempotent - running multiple times doesn't cause errors
Correctly identifies sales-eligible doc types
Checks customer_no first, then customer_name for rep lookup
Uses customer_rep_overrides for name-based matching
Routes to triage when no rep found
Sets sales_review_status to pending_rep_review or auto_approved based on confidence
Creates sales_review_history audit entries
Auto-assign hooked into _internal_intake_document (email path) at server.py ~line 3026
Auto-assign hooked into intake_document (upload path) at server.py ~line 3574
Both paths import and call auto_assign_sales_rep from services/sales_auto_assign.py
Errors are caught and logged without breaking the intake pipeline
get_rep_for_customer checks overrides first, then BC cache
Returns rep_email, rep_name, salesperson_code, source
Returns None when no mapping exists
Endpoint exists and accepts file uploads
Returns 422 for missing file (proper validation)
Pipeline executes classification, validation, and auto-assign steps

mocked_apis.note: BC Sandbox and SharePoint Graph API calls remain mocked in preview environment
